title: rubus vulgaris var. velutinus
intro: Rubus vulgaris var. velutinus, also known as the velvety raspberry or velvety thimbleberry, is a variant of the common raspberry plant, characterized by its distinctive velvety leaves and dark red berries. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus vulgaris var. velutinus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Rubus vulgaris var. velutinus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
